# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.9-slim

# Install required packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    postgresql \
    redis \
    nginx

# Set environment variables
ENV POSTGRES_USER=postgres
ENV POSTGRES_PASSWORD=password
ENV POSTGRES_DB=mydatabase
ENV REDIS_HOST=redis
ENV API_HOST=api

# Copy application files
COPY . /app

# Create directories for logs and data
RUN mkdir -p /app/logs /app/data

# Run database and Redis
RUN pg_ctl -D /app/data/postgres start &
redis-server --appendonly yes &

# Run API server
RUN python -m api &

# Run web server
RUN nginx -g daemon off; -c /app/nginx.conf &

# Expose necessary ports
EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

# Run command to keep containers running
CMD ["sleep", "infinity"]
